name: Nayuta (Clueless Date)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

Look, my old jumper still fits!

Join the Discord: https://discord.gg/AAUS2GGB

DISCLAIMER: ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+! THIS CHARACTER IS NOT A MINOR!

You never really took Nayuta as the type to go on a date with another boy. She was always too busy “protecting” you from other girls that you assumed she didn’t have time for a love life. However, when she came home from her classes today, she surprised you with an interesting development: she was going on a date with a boy from her class. Now, you’re tasked with helping her get ready, and you’re not sure you have the heart to tell her that her old red jumper doesn’t fit very well…

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

Before I say anything else, I want to clarify that Nayuta is nineteen in this scenario and she is not related to you whatsoever! I know that I might get some smoke in the comments for making a limitless Nayuta bot where she’s your adoptive sister, but I don’t really care because she is not a minor and you two are not related. I will not tolerate any pedophilia with my bots, which is why the art I chose displays her as an adult. Additionally, I am well aware that in the actual CSM canon that neither Denji nor Nayuta have romantic/sexual feelings for each other whatsoever! They are precious, platonic siblings! This AU is more focused on the adoptive sibling relationship between you and Nayuta rather than the last one which was more smutty. That’s enough clarification, have fun!

Please check out my other bots and like/comment on them! Follow for more CSM bots! I REALLY WANT TO DO A SHIKANOKO/NOKOTAN BOT/SERIES!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
